S: 220 mail.lab.local ESMTP Postfix
C: EHLO drederick.local
S: 250-mail.lab.local
S: 250-PIPELINING
S: 250-SIZE 10485760
S: 250-VRFY
S: 250-ETRN
S: 250-STARTTLS
S: 250-AUTH PLAIN LOGIN
S: 250 HELP
C: VRFY admin
S: 550 5.1.1 <admin>: Recipient address rejected: User unknown
C: VRFY root
S: 252 2.0.0 root
C: QUIT
S: 221 2.0.0 Bye
